command: Rscript -e 'library(ggplot2); years <- seq(1835, 2025, 5); d <- data.frame(date=as.Date(paste0(years, "-01-01")), value=seq_along(years)); x <- ggplot_build(ggplot(d, aes(date, value)) + geom_line())$layout$panel_params[[1]]$x; x$get_breaks(); x$get_labels()'
parity: ggsvelte draws the same four in-domain 50-year labels. ggplot2 also returns padded out-of-domain break slots as NA; ggsvelte plans only drawable in-domain ticks.
